title: Among Us Totems
body:
#         **                            RGB  Among us Totem

        This Texture Pack Changes ur Totem into a RGB Amongus Character  Upon Renaming it

 

##                    **Notice Only Works For The Version 25w03a & above Only!**
**
 

###                                     **   Instructions **
 

- **_ 1, After Downloading , Put the Texture Pack File in .minecraft folder's Resource Pack Folder
- 
-  2. After Puting in the File in the Folder go to minecraft and Turn on the Resource Pack
-                                                                                                  
-  3. To turn your normal totem in to the Special Totem Rename it to "Amongus"_**


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ZZcy7_xmoao" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
